div1.entryFree:
Retail, 1) to tell: he is furnished with no certainties more than he haply may r. from me, H4B I, 1, 32. the truth should live from age to age, as 'twere --ed to all posterity, R3 III, 1, 77. to whom I will r. my conquest won, IV, 4, 335.
2) to sell at second hand and in small quantities: he is wit's pedlar and --s his wares at wakes and wassails, LLL V, 2, 317.
